trial_type.Description: Condition label for the Scientific Creativity Task, including hypothesis generation and control conditions.

stimulus.Description: Cue word or scenario identifier from the source timing table.

fix_onset.Description: Fixation onset from the source timing table.

fix_duration.Description: Fixation duration from the source timing table.

response_onset.Description: Response period onset from the source timing table.

response_duration.Description: Response period duration from the source timing table.
